tasks.label: Kill and Rebuild
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM AuraClean.exe; Start-Sleep 2; dotnet build -c Debug c:\Users\SuperHands\Desktop\cleaner\AuraClean\AuraClean.csproj

tasks.label: Test App Launch
tasks.command: $p = Start-Process -FilePath 'c:\Users\SuperHands\Desktop\cleaner\AuraClean\bin\Debug\net8.0-windows\win-x64\AuraClean.exe' -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $p.Refresh(); Write-Host "Process alive: $(!$p.HasExited)"; Write-Host "MainWindowTitle: $($p.MainWindowTitle)"; Write-Host "MainWindowHandle: $($p.MainWindowHandle)"; if(!$p.HasExited) { Write-Host 'App is running with window!'; $p.Kill() } else { Write-Host "Exit code: $($p.ExitCode)" }

tasks.label: Rebuild AuraClean
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM AuraClean.exe 2>$null; Start-Sleep 1; dotnet build -c Debug c:\Users\SuperHands\Desktop\cleaner\AuraClean\AuraClean.csproj

tasks.label: Test App Launch v2
tasks.command: $p = Start-Process -FilePath 'c:\Users\SuperHands\Desktop\cleaner\AuraClean\bin\Debug\net8.0-windows\win-x64\AuraClean.exe' -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $p.Refresh(); Write-Host "Process alive: $(!$p.HasExited)"; Write-Host "MainWindowTitle: '$($p.MainWindowTitle)'"; Write-Host "MainWindowHandle: $($p.MainWindowHandle)"; if(Test-Path C:\Users\SuperHands\Desktop\AuraClean_crash.log) { Write-Host '--- CRASH LOG ---'; Get-Content C:\Users\SuperHands\Desktop\AuraClean_crash.log } else { Write-Host 'No crash log found' }; if(!$p.HasExited) { $p.Kill() }

tasks.label: Final Build
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM AuraClean.exe 2>$null; Start-Sleep 1; dotnet build -c Debug c:\Users\SuperHands\Desktop\cleaner\AuraClean\AuraClean.csproj

tasks.label: Rebuild Padding Fix
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM AuraClean.exe 2>$null; Start-Sleep 1; dotnet build -c Debug c:\Users\SuperHands\Desktop\cleaner\AuraClean\AuraClean.csproj
